body_text:
20:42 â October 30, 2020
New Form: IBAN Country List
We created an IBAN Country List, Form 9252, which provides a list of International Bank Account Number (IBAN) regulated Countries and IBAN code information. Previously, users needed to access the Money Transfer System (MTS) to access the IBAN Country List.
